effect_cn: 出牌阶段限一次, 你可以将一张手牌扣置于你装备区里的【木牛流马】下, 然后你可以将此装备移动到一名其他角色的装备区里; 你可以如手牌般使用或打出【木牛流马】下的牌。
effect_en: Once per play phase, if fewer than five cards are stored under this card, you may place one hand card face-down beneath it. If you do, you may move this card to the equipment zone of another character who has no treasure card there. You may use or play any card stored beneath this card as though it were a hand card.

faq.a_cn: 不算。储备牌不在手牌区，不受针对手牌的技能影响（如弃置、拼点等），只有在可以「使用或打出」手牌的时机才能动用储备牌。
faq.q_en: Do cards stored under [Wooden Ox] count as hand cards?
faq.a_en: No. Stored cards are not hand cards and are unaffected by effects that target hand cards (such as discarding or competing). They can only be used or played at moments that allow you to use or play a hand card.

faq.q_cn: 一张牌最多可以储存几张牌？
faq.a_cn: 至多5张。每个出牌阶段只能放入1张。
faq.q_en: How many cards can be stored under [Wooden Ox] at once?
faq.a_en: Up to 5 cards. Only 1 card may be placed under it per play phase.

faq.q_cn: 把【木牛流马】传给别人时，储备牌也一起转移吗？
faq.a_cn: 视情况而定。若【木牛流马】是从装备区移动到另一个装备区（如通过本身效果、甘露、巧变等），储备牌随之一并转移。若【木牛流马】进入装备区以外的区域（如被顺手牵羊牵走后进入手牌区，或被过河拆桥弃置），储备牌全部置入弃牌堆。
faq.q_en: When [Wooden Ox] moves to another character, do stored cards transfer too?
faq.a_en: It depends. If [Wooden Ox] moves from one equipment zone to another (via its own effect, [Sweet Dew], [Adapt], etc.), all stored cards transfer along with it. If it leaves the equipment zone for any other area (e.g. stolen by [Steal] into a hand, or discarded by [Dismantle]), all stored cards are placed into the discard pile.

faq.q_cn: 没有放入储备牌的情况下，可以移动【木牛流马】吗？
faq.a_cn: 不可以。必须先放入一张牌，才能选择是否移动。
faq.q_en: Can [Wooden Ox] be moved without storing a card first?
faq.a_en: No. You must store a card before you may choose to move it.

faq.q_cn: 可以使用储备牌发动武将的转化技能（如武圣、龙胆）吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。任何允许「将手牌当作其他牌使用或打出」的转化技能，均可以选择储备牌发动，例如武圣、龙胆等。
faq.q_en: Can stored cards be used to activate a general's conversion skill (such as [Valor] or [Dragon Soul])?
faq.a_en: Yes. Any conversion skill that allows you to use or play a hand card as another card can be activated using a stored card.

faq.q_cn: 大乔的【流离】或小乔的【天香】可以使用储备牌发动吗？
faq.a_cn: 不可以。这类技能需要「弃置」牌，而储备牌只能被「使用或打出」，无法被弃置。
faq.q_en: Can Da Qiao's [Fleeting] or Xiao Qiao's [Heavenly Fragrance] be activated using stored cards?
faq.a_en: No. Those skills require discarding a card, and stored cards can only be used or played — they cannot be discarded.
